name: Yucca
compose:
name: slashnode-yucca
services:
  yucca:
    image: yuccastream/yucca:0.12.3
    container_name: yucca
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      YUCCA_SERVER_DATA_DIR: /opt/yucca/data
      YUCCA_SMTP_SERVER_LISTEN_ADDRESS: ':10925'
    volumes:
      - yucca_data-data:/opt/yucca/data
      - yucca_data-ffmpeg:/opt/yucca/ffmpeg
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9910:9910
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  yucca_data-data:
    name: slashnode-yucca_yucca_data-data
  yucca_data-ffmpeg:
    name: slashnode-yucca_yucca_data-ffmpeg
